user.title: Natural Resources Wales
user.description: Please select the type of API connection

reauth_confirm.title: Re-authentication required
reauth_confirm.description: Your API key has expired. Please re-enter it.

add_river_api.title: Authentication required
add_river_api.description: Please enter your River Levels API Key - see https://github.com/gitStasher/nrw-river-levels?tab=readme-ov-file#-obtaining-api-key

select_station.title: Select River Monitoring Station
select_station.description: Please select the river station you wish to monitor. You can setup additional stations later if required.

error.invalid_auth: API authentication failed using the API key you provided.

abort.reauth_successful: Reauthentication successful. The integration for this config entry has been reloaded.
abort.additional_station_added: The new monitoring station was added successfully.
abort.feature_not_implemented: This feature is not yet implemented.
abort.config_flow_failed: An error occurred during setup. Please refer to the error logs for more information.
